title: Feel My Love Lyrics Kutty
stanzas:
En Kadhal Sariyo Thavaro Song Lyrics Kutty
#DSP #KayKay #Dhanush

En kadhal sariyo thavaro
en kadhal mullo malaro
en kadhal mudhalo mudivo
sagiye feel my love

en kadhal veyilo nizhalo
en kadhal inippi kasappo
en kadhal nirayo kuraiyo
sagiye feel my love

en kadhal silayo kallo
en kadhal sirago sarugo
en kadhal valiyo sugamo
veruthom pudithom
aditho anaithom

feel my love
feel my love

En kadhal sariyo thavaro
en kadhal mullo malaro
en kadhal mudhalo mudivo
sagiye feel my love

naan thandha
poovai ellaam
veesumpodhu
feel my love

en kadhal kaditham
kilikkum podhu
feel my love

en veedhi theriyum
jannal moodum podhu
feel my love
en seigai ellaam
verukkum podhum
feel my love

sila vaarthai
thitti pesu
adhu kooda podhume

en kadhal vettri
pettra sandhosam
kollume..

vegathil pogum
podhu kaalai
thattum kallaai kooda

feel my love
feel my love

En kadhal sariyo thavaro
en kadhal mullo malaro
en kadhal mudhalo mudivo
sagiye feel my love

kai visiri pole
un kai theendum
vara vendaam
min visir pole

feel my love

panirendu mani mullai
pola sera aasiyillai
thandavaalam pole
thodarven
anbae feel my love

yaar kannai paarka

sollumaa

vandhaal roja poo
kollumaa

naanunnai kadhal

unnadhu madhiye.

feel my love

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Feel My Love'?

The song expresses deep emotions of love and longing, conveying the feelings of affection and connection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Kutty'?

In the movie Kutty, this song highlights the romantic moments between the lead characters, enhancing the emotional depth of their relationship.

Who is the singer and music director of 'Feel My Love'?

The song is sung by KK and composed by Devi Sri Prasad.

When was 'Feel My Love' released?

The song was released on December 23, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In the song 'Feel My Love' from the movie Kutty, the lyrics beautifully articulate the emotions of love and affection. The melody, paired with KK's heartfelt vocals, creates a romantic atmosphere that resonates with listeners. This track serves as a perfect backdrop for moments of celebration and connection between lovers. Overall, it evokes feelings of joy and warmth, making it a timeless romantic anthem.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Feel My Love is a mesmerizing romantic track that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With KK's soulful voice and Devi Sri Prasad's enchanting composition, this song from the movie Kutty is sure to tug at your heartstrings. Dive into the melodic journey that celebrates love in its purest form.
stanzaMeanings: Is my love right or wrong, my love is like a flower, my love has a beginning and an end, feel my love.
My love is like a breeze, my love is sweet and bitter, my love has many flaws, feel my love.
My love is like a shadow, my love is like a song, my love is good or bad, we have accepted everything.
feel my love feel my love
Is my love right or wrong, my love is like a flower, my love has a beginning and an end, feel my love.
When I give you flowers, feel my love.
When my love message arrives, feel my love.
When my street knows and the window closes, feel my love, all my actions will be enough, feel my love.
Just a few words spoken is enough.
My love brings the joy of victory.
When I rush, even the morning will be a thief.
feel my love feel my love
Is my love right or wrong, my love is like a flower, my love has a beginning and an end, feel my love.
Like a butterfly, your hand should not touch me, I will live like a lightning, beautiful, feel my love.
Like two jasmine flowers, there is no desire, I will continue like a dance, my dear, feel my love.
Who should look at the sky, will the wind say? If anyone comes, will the rose flower bloom?
I don't need to love you, it's enough that you are wise.
feel my love feel my love
Is my love right or wrong, my love is like a flower, my love has a beginning and an end, feel my love.
